title: Build a usePrevious Hook
prompt: Build a `usePrevious<T>(value: T): T | undefined` hook that returns the value from the *previous* render. On the first render it should return `undefined`.
context: `useRef` creates a mutable object that persists across renders without causing re-renders when updated. The trick here: update the ref *after* render (inside `useEffect`) so it always holds the previous value, not the current one.
